'''âv-y-zh''' ('''kavayazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quiver|quiver]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quiver|quiver]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-y-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kavayazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivayazh|thivayazh]] || [[word:jivayazh|jivayazh]] || [[word:shivayazh|shivayazh]] || [[word:kivayazh|kivayazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvayazh|thuthuvayazh]] || [[word:jujuvayazh|jujuvayazh]] || [[word:shushuvayazh|shushuvayazh]] || [[word:kukuvayazh|kukuvayazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvayazh|thuvayazh]] || [[word:juvayazh|juvayazh]] || [[word:shuvayazh|shuvayazh]] || [[word:kuvayazh|kuvayazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvayazh|thuvayazh]] || [[word:juvayazh|juvayazh]] || [[word:shuvayazh|shuvayazh]] || [[word:kuvayazh|kuvayazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevayazh|thevayazh]] || [[word:jevayazh|jevayazh]] || [[word:shevayazh|shevayazh]] || [[word:kevayazh|kevayazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovayazh|thothovayazh]] || [[word:jojovayazh|jojovayazh]] || [[word:shoshovayazh|shoshovayazh]] || [[word:kokovayazh|kokovayazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovayazh|thovayazh]] || [[word:jovayazh|jovayazh]] || [[word:shovayazh|shovayazh]] || [[word:kovayazh|kovayazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovayazh|thovayazh]] || [[word:jovayazh|jovayazh]] || [[word:shovayazh|shovayazh]] || [[word:kovayazh|kovayazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvayazh|thĂŠvayazh]] || [[word:jĂŠvayazh|jĂŠvayazh]] || [[word:shĂŠvayazh|shĂŠvayazh]] || [[word:kĂŠvayazh|kĂŠvayazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavayazh|thathavayazh]] || [[word:jajavayazh|jajavayazh]] || [[word:shashavayazh|shashavayazh]] || [[word:kakavayazh|kakavayazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavayazh|thavayazh]] || [[word:javayazh|javayazh]] || [[word:shavayazh|shavayazh]] || [[word:kavayazh|kavayazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavayazh|thavayazh]] || [[word:javayazh|javayazh]] || [[word:shavayazh|shavayazh]] || [[word:kavayazh|kavayazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavayazh|shavayazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavayazh|goshavayazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavayazh|gokishavayazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavayazhnĂŒ|shavayazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavayazhnknĂŒ|goshavayazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavayazhnĂŒ|gokishavayazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavayazhshĂ«|shavayazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkshĂ«|goshavayazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavayazhshĂ«|gokishavayazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavayazhro|shavayazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkro|goshavayazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavayazhro|gokishavayazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavayazhmu|shavayazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkmu|goshavayazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavayazhmu|gokishavayazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavayazhsher|shavayazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavayazhnksher|goshavayazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavayazhsher|gokishavayazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavayazhng|shavayazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkng|goshavayazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavayazhng|gokishavayazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavayazhya|shavayazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkya|goshavayazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavayazhya|gokishavayazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavayazhyam|shavayazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkyam|goshavayazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavayazhyam|gokishavayazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavayazhnĂŒshĂ«|shavayazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavayazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavayazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavayazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavayazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavayazhnĂŒro|shavayazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavayazhnknĂŒro|goshavayazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavayazhnĂŒro|gokishavayazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavayazhnĂŒmu|shavayazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavayazhnknĂŒmu|goshavayazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavayazhnĂŒmu|gokishavayazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavayazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shavayazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavayazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavayazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavayazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavayazhshĂ«ro|shavayazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkshĂ«ro|goshavayazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavayazhshĂ«ro|gokishavayazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavayazhshĂ«mu|shavayazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkshĂ«mu|goshavayazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavayazhshĂ«mu|gokishavayazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavayazhronĂŒ|shavayazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkronĂŒ|goshavayazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavayazhronĂŒ|gokishavayazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavayazhroshĂ«|shavayazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkroshĂ«|goshavayazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavayazhroshĂ«|gokishavayazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavayazhromu|shavayazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkromu|goshavayazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavayazhromu|gokishavayazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavayazhmunĂŒ|shavayazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkmunĂŒ|goshavayazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavayazhmunĂŒ|gokishavayazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavayazhmushĂ«|shavayazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkmushĂ«|goshavayazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavayazhmushĂ«|gokishavayazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavayazhmuro|shavayazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavayazhnkmuro|goshavayazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavayazhmuro|gokishavayazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
